error_signature: only the first request is executed properly
title: Only the first HTTP request executes in loop
symptom: When using a Loop Over Item node, only the first HTTP Request is processed, while subsequent requests are not executed.
applies_when: HTTP Request node is after the Loop Over Item node
not_this_if: HTTP Request node is before the Loop Over Item node
root_cause: The Loop Over Item node is designed to iterate over items and execute subsequent nodes for each item. If the HTTP Request node is placed after the Loop Over Item node, it will only execute for the first item, as the loop does not trigger it for subsequent items.
fix_steps: Move the HTTP Request node before the Loop Over Item node in the workflow
Ensure the Loop Over Item node is configured to iterate over the correct data
agent_instruction: Rearrange the workflow to place the HTTP Request node before the Loop Over Item node.
